title: The Dark Knight
description: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham.

title: Inception
description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity survival.

title: The Prestige
description: After a tragic accident two stage magicians engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion.

description: After training with his mentor Batman begins his fight to free crime-ridden Gotham City.

title: The Avengers
description: Earth mightiest heroes must come together and learn to fight as a team to stop Loki.

title: Iron Man
description: After being held captive in an Afghan cave billionaire engineer Tony Stark creates a suit of armor.

title: Captain America
description: Steve Rogers a rejected military soldier transforms into Captain America.

title: Thor
description: The powerful but arrogant god Thor is cast out of Asgard to live amongst humans on Earth.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy
description: A group of intergalactic criminals must pull together to stop a fanatical warrior.

title: Toy Story
description: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened and jealous when a new spaceman figure becomes top toy.

title: Finding Nemo
description: After his son is captured in the Great Barrier Reef and taken to Sydney a timid clownfish.

title: The Lion King
description: A young lion prince is cast out of his pride by his cruel uncle.

title: Aladdin
description: A kind-hearted street urchin and a power-hungry Grand Vizier vie for a magic lamp.

title: Frozen
description: When the newly crowned Queen Elsa accidentally uses her power to turn things into ice.
